positive: A stylized, abstract forest scene composed entirely of geometric, nature-inspired shapes. The main subject is a serene, central grouping of stylized oak leaves and winding river branches, rendered in a monochromatic palette of deep teal, forest green, and creamy ivory. The composition must feature strong, clean silhouettes against a subtle, distressed parchment background. Use bold graphic design principles, strong negative space, and clean vector-art aesthetics. Perfect for an apparel print, with high contrast and symmetry. Minimalist and impactful, suitable for all ages.
negative: blur, noise, graffiti, text, signature, watermark, logo, low resolution, grainy, messy, disfigured, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts, blurry edges, realistic photography, 3d render, oil painting
